= RuddyDoc User Guide
:author: Jane Doe
:revdate: 2024-01-15

== Introduction

RuddyDoc is a semantically rich document converter.
It transforms documents into RDF graphs.

=== Features

* Markdown support
* AsciiDoc support
* WebVTT support

=== Roadmap

. Implement core backends
. Add export formats
. Release v1.0

== Code Examples

[source,rust]
----
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, RuddyDoc!");
}
----

| Markdown | Complete
| AsciiDoc | In Progress
